post.description:
SSE endpoint that pushes a 'reload' event when the named policy is
updated (version increments) or deleted.

The stream stays open and monitors the policy version, exiting when
a change is detected so clients can re-fetch the policy.

Stored in the existing user_settings table so approvals survive process restarts.

Requires DEVELOPER or ADMIN role unless the requester is rejecting their own request.

get.description:
Query audit events with filters.

Requires authentication. Results are ordered by timestamp descending.

Args:
    current_user: The authenticated user.
    agent_id: Optional agent ID filter.
    session_id: Optional session ID filter.
    time_range_start: Optional start time filter.
    time_range_end: Optional end time filter.
    event_type: Optional event type filter.
    limit: Maximum number of events to return (1-1000, default 100).
    skip: Number of events to skip for pagination.

Returns:
    AuditEventsResponse containing list of matching events.

parameters.name: time_range_start

schema.description: Filter events after this timestamp (ISO 8601 format)
schema.title: Time Range Start

parameters.description: Filter events after this timestamp (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: time_range_end

schema.description: Filter events before this timestamp (ISO 8601 format)
schema.title: Time Range End

parameters.description: Filter events before this timestamp (ISO 8601 format)

get.description:
Get all events for a specific trace.

Requires authentication. Results are ordered by timestamp ascending.

Args:
    trace_id: The trace ID to look up.
    current_user: The authenticated user.

Returns:
    AuditEventsResponse containing all events for the trace.

ApprovalRequestCreate.title: ApprovalRequestCreate

ApprovalResolve.title: ApprovalResolve
ApprovalResolve.description: Optional comment when approving or rejecting.

ApprovalStatus.title: ApprovalStatus
ApprovalStatus.description: Possible states for an approval request.

AuditEventResponse.title: AuditEventResponse
AuditEventResponse.description: Response model for an audit event.

AuditEventType.title: AuditEventType
AuditEventType.description: Types of audit events that can be logged.

AuditEventsResponse.title: AuditEventsResponse
AuditEventsResponse.description: Response model for a list of audit events.

BatchEmbedRequest.title: BatchEmbedRequest
BatchEmbedRequest.description: Request model for batch embedding generation.

BatchEmbedResponse.title: BatchEmbedResponse
BatchEmbedResponse.description: Response model for batch embedding generation.

DeploymentCreate.title: DeploymentCreate
DeploymentCreate.description: Request model for creating a deployment

DeploymentRollbackRequest.title: DeploymentRollbackRequest
DeploymentRollbackRequest.description: Request model for rolling back a deployment

DeploymentVersionHistoryResponse.title: DeploymentVersionHistoryResponse
DeploymentVersionHistoryResponse.description: Response model for deployment version history

MetricsReportRequest.title: MetricsReportRequest
MetricsReportRequest.description: Request model for reporting agent metrics

cache_read_tokens.title: Cache Read Tokens
cache_read_tokens.description: Tokens served from prompt cache (reduced cost)

total_tokens.title: Total Tokens
total_tokens.description: Sum of all token fields. Convenience field.

cost_usd.title: Cost Usd
cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD. Null if pricing is unknown.

model.title: Model
model.description: Model used for cost calculation (may differ from run-level model)

MutxCost.title: MutxCost
MutxCost.description:
Token usage and cost attribution for a run.

Ported from agent-run/cost.json schema.

pass.title: Pass
pass.description: Whether the run met its acceptance criteria

score.title: Score
score.description: Numeric score (0-100). Interpretation depends on task_type.

expected_outcome.title: Expected Outcome
expected_outcome.description: What the eval expected the agent to produce

regression_from.title: Regression From
regression_from.description: Run ID this was compared against for regression detection

detail.title: Detail
detail.description: Human-readable evaluation notes or failure explanation

benchmark_id.title: Benchmark Id
benchmark_id.description: Identifier of the benchmark pack used (e.g., 'mutx/bench/bug-fix@1.0')

MutxEval.title: MutxEval
MutxEval.description:
Evaluation result for a scored agent run.

Ported from agent-run/eval.json schema.

Runs can be scored after completion. MutxEval tracks:
- pass/fail against acceptance criteria
- score (0-100) for nuanced grading
- metrics: cost, duration, tool calls, retries, convergence
- regression detection via regression_from linking

MutxEvalCreate.title: MutxEvalCreate
MutxEvalCreate.description: Schema for submitting an evaluation result.

convergence_score.title: Convergence Score
convergence_score.description: How directly the agent reached the solution (1.0 = optimal path, 0.0 = lost)

MutxEvalMetrics.title: MutxEvalMetrics
MutxEvalMetrics.description:
Quantitative metrics for evaluation.

Ported from agent-run/eval.json metrics schema.

MutxOutcome.title: MutxOutcome
MutxOutcome.description: Result quality of a run - distinct from status.

run_hash.title: Run Hash
run_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of canonical run inputs

parent_run_hash.title: Parent Run Hash
parent_run_hash.description: Hash of the parent run that triggered this one, forming a hash chain

lineage.title: Lineage
lineage.description: Ordered chain of ancestor run hashes (root first). Enables full audit trail traversal.

config_hash.title: Config Hash
config_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the agent's configuration at time of run

signed_by.title: Signed By
signed_by.description: Public key or key ID that signed this provenance record

signature.title: Signature
signature.description: Ed25519 signature over the canonical provenance JSON

created_at.title: Created At
created_at.description: When this provenance record was generated

MutxProvenance.title: MutxProvenance
MutxProvenance.description:
Cryptographic provenance record - proves how an output was produced.

Ported from agent-run/provenance.json schema.

Every run gets a run_hash - a SHA-256 of the canonical inputs
(agent_id, model, tools_available, config_hash, trigger).
Runs triggered by other runs form a hash chain via lineage.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique run identifier (UUID v7 recommended). Auto-generated if not provided.

parent_run_id.title: Parent Run Id
parent_run_id.description: Parent run ID if triggered by another run

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: Start timestamp. Defaults to now if not provided.

cost.description: Cost info. Will be set to zero-cost if not provided.

provenance.description: Provenance. Will be generated if not provided.

MutxRunCreate.title: MutxRunCreate
MutxRunCreate.description: Schema for creating a new MutxRun via API.

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique step identifier within the run

type.description: What kind of step this is

tool_name.title: Tool Name
tool_name.description: Name of the tool called (for tool_call/tool_result steps)

mcp_server.title: Mcp Server
mcp_server.description: MCP server that provided the tool, if applicable

input_preview.title: Input Preview
input_preview.description: Truncated preview of the step input (for observability without leaking full prompts)

output_preview.title: Output Preview
output_preview.description: Truncated preview of the step output

success.title: Success
success.description: Whether this step succeeded (for tool calls)

error.title: Error
error.description: Error message if the step failed

tokens_used.title: Tokens Used
tokens_used.description: Total tokens consumed by this step (input + output)

MutxStep.title: MutxStep
MutxStep.description:
A single step within an agent run - a reasoning block, tool call, or error.

Ported from agent-run/step.json schema.

id.title: Id
id.description: Step ID. Auto-generated if not provided.

started_at.title: Started At
started_at.description: Step start time. Defaults to now if not provided.

MutxStepCreate.title: MutxStepCreate
MutxStepCreate.description: Schema for adding a step to an existing run.

MutxStepType.title: MutxStepType
MutxStepType.description: Types of steps within an agent run.

Policy.title: Policy
Policy.description: A named collection of rules with versioning and enablement.

Rule.title: Rule
Rule.description: A policy rule matching mechanism and enforcement action.

event_type.title: Event Type
event_type.description: Type of usage event (e.g., api_call, agent_run, deployment)

resource_type.title: Resource Type
resource_type.description: Type of resource that was used

UsageEventCreate.title: UsageEventCreate
UsageEventCreate.description: Request model for creating a usage event

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Deserialize event_metadata JSON string to dict

url.title: Url
url.description: The URL to receive webhook events

events.title: Events
events.description: List of events to subscribe to (e.g., 'agent.status', 'deployment.*', '*' for all)

is_active.title: Is Active
is_active.description: Whether the webhook should be active immediately

WebhookCreate.title: WebhookCreate
WebhookCreate.description: Request model for creating a webhook

secret.title: Secret
secret.description: Always null. Webhook secrets are write-only and never returned after creation.
